title: Software Engineering (English) Program Educational Objectives
content:
Software Engineering (English) Program Educational Objectives

Program Educational Objectives

1. To educate graduates who possess professional competencies in Software Engineering, and who can find employment opportunities in national and international organizations.

2. To educate graduates who are prepared for postgraduate studies in computer science and related disciplines, and who continuously improve themselves through professional and academic development with a strong awareness of lifelong learning.

3. To educate software engineers who are responsible individuals, capable of sustaining a satisfying professional career, possessing broad social awareness, and taking meaningful and responsible roles in society.
